name: Light Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup Nonfat Italian Salad Dressing, or Lowfat
1 Red Bell Pepper - Or Green, Chopped
1/4 Cup Fresh Parsley - Or Fresh Dillweed
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and thinly slice potatoes. Canned sliced potatoes, drained, may be substituted.
2. Add cheese, dressing, mayonnaise, yogurt, bell pepper, onion, parsley, salt, and pepper; toss lightly to mix evenly.
3. Refrigerate 2 or more hours until serving time, allowing flavors to blend.
4. Serve on beds of lettuce, if desired.
(Makes 10 servings, about one cup each)
(Nutritional data per serving: Calories, 139; protein, 11 grams; carbohydrates, 24 grams; fat, 0.13 grams; cholesterol, none; sodium, 470 milligrams.)
